title: Delicious Malaysian Thai Eggplant Curry
description: A peppery and cozy Malaysian dish featuring Thai eggplant, with a glassy jelly glaze, made in a wok and suitable for shojin friendly diets. This curry is a flavorful and aromatic representation of Malaysian Thai cuisine.
instructions: Heat the oil in a wok over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the coconut milk, water, salt, pepper, and palm sugar, and stir to combine.
Add the Thai eggplant and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the eggplant is tender.
Remove the wok from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
